title: Mace Glow
description: This plugin adds a glowing effect to every player who has an MACE in their inventory
body:
# This plugin is for public use, give this modrinth link to whoever asks for it!
## Bugs / glitches should be told to me immediatly

Glowing Mace
Add a fun and functional twist to your server with Glowing Mace! This lightweight plugin makes any player carrying a mace in their inventory automatically glow, making them stand out from the crowd. Whether you're using it for PvP balance, player tracking, or just a cool cosmetic effect, it’s a simple way to spice up gameplay.

No complicated setup or configs — just drop the plugin into your plugins folder and you’re done. It’s designed to be super easy to use, with zero configuration required and no commands needed.

Compatible with almost every modern server version and fork — Paper, Bukkit, Spigot, Purpur, etc.
And best of all? It’s optimized for performance, so it won’t cause lag for players or put any extra load on your server.

If you're looking for a quick, clean, and effective way to highlight players carrying maces, Glowing Mace has you covered.

## Happy Macing!

Player While holding / having a mace in inventory:
![With Mace](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a5ea09fce7ecdcbf1a02ed5821355d938d55fce4.png)

Player after dropping the mace:
![Without Mace](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/af1c6968401f2d383a004b0c8d3ea95e333bae4b.png)
